ExternalServiceRegistration.label: CreateNewService
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: 3.0.0 info: title: Toolto version: 1.0.0 servers: - url: https://dev.tooltoelba.es components: securitySchemes: bearerAuth: type: http scheme: bearer paths: /api/login: post: tags: - default summary: Login requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object required: - email - password properties: email: type: string example: testes@mk-is.pt password: type: string example: teste123 x-apex-values: true responses: '200': description: OK content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: message: type: string example: Bienvenido de Nuevo data: type: string example: 9|Rxgm5tgwsGcCwKKGYik87XsEvZnIoTCd7OmCoEgY90cd9d4c /api/service: post: tags: - default summary: New Service requestBody: content: application/json: schema: type: object required: - service_number - process_number - provider_vat_number - provider_email - provider_name properties: service_number: type: string example: '1' process_number: type: string example: '2' provider_vat_number: type: string example: '3' provider_email: type: string example: '4' provider_name: type: string example: '5' security: - bearerAuth: [] responses: '200': description: OK headers: Alt-Svc: schema: type: string example: h3=":443"; ma=2592000 Cache-Control: schema: type: string example: no-cache, private Content-Encoding: schema: type: string example: br Content-Type: schema: type: string example: application/json Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: schema: type: string example: unsafe-none Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: schema: type: string example: unsafe-none Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: schema: type: string example: cross-origin Date: schema: type: string example: Thu, 12 Jun 2025 10:05:18 GMT Link: schema: type: string example: >- <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/app-CM4rcpO3.css>; rel="preload"; as="style", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/Login-CqZ_0Sl8.css>; rel="preload"; as="style", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/app-Ckm__f2d.js>; rel="modulepreload", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/Login-DQ2UCn7B.js>; rel="modulepreload", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/TextInput-BAWrrO2q.js>; rel="modulepreload", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/PrimaryButton-D8syGl97.js>; rel="modulepreload", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/flash-messages-Buy_ezRO.js>; rel="modulepreload", <https://dev.tooltoelba.es/build/assets/_plugin-vue_export-helper-DlAUqK2U.js>; rel="modulepreload" Permissions-Policy: schema: type: string example: >- accelerometer=(self), ambient-light-sensor=(self), attribution-reporting=*, autoplay=(self), bluetooth=(self), browsing-topics=*, camera=(self), compute-pressure=(self), cross-origin-isolated=(self), display-capture=(self), document-domain=*, encrypted-media=(self), fullscreen=(self), gamepad=(self), geolocation=(self), gyroscope=(self), hid=(self), identity-credentials-get=(self), idle-detection=(self), local-fonts=(self), magnetometer=(self), microphone=(self), midi=(self), otp-credentials=(self), payment=(self), picture-in-picture=*, publickey-credentials-create=(self), publickey-credentials-get=(self), screen-wake-lock=(self), serial=(self), speaker-selection=(self), storage-access=*, usb=(self), web-share=(self), window-management=(self), xr-spatial-tracking=(self) Referrer-Policy: schema: type: string example: no-referrer Server: schema: type: string example: Caddy Set-Cookie: schema: type: string example: >- tooltoima_%3D; expires=Thu, 12 Jun 2025 12:05:18 GMT; Max-Age=7200; path=/; domain=.tooltoelba.es; secure; httponly; samesite=strict Vary: schema: type: string example: Accept-Encoding X-Content-Type-Options: schema: type: string example: nosniff X-Download-Options: schema: type: string example: noopen X-Frame-Options: schema: type: string example: sameorigin X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies: schema: type: string example: none Transfer-Encoding: schema: type: string example: chunked content: application/json: schema: type: object example: {}
